floor_history.headline: fable-blitz recon: h2 (dead local) and new_var (single-use write pointer) are inert-likely — the sym+2 fold and the interleaved schedule are reachable from direct spellings; the do-while(0) is the one

frontier.hypothesis: Strip all three flagged constructs at once (plain struct assign, no h2, direct `(&D_800EEDD8)[1]` store) — expect floor stays 0 (all inert)
frontier.mechanism: sym+2 address fold in expr/combine is spelling-independent; dead pseudo has zero refs; loop notes likely reemitted not fenced
frontier.next_probe: sandbox camera_InitBoneData --disable all on the fully-clean form; 0 => done, non-zero => isolate

frontier.hypothesis: If the clean form diverges: isolate by stripping ONE construct at a time (h2 only, new_var only, wrapper only) to attribute the diff — prediction: any diff comes from the do-while(0) as a sched fence between copy and halvings, not from h2/new_var
frontier.mechanism: NOTE_INSN_LOOP_BEG/END interaction with sched.c on the single-BB function
frontier.next_probe: three single-strip sandbox runs; compare which one moves the lhu/sh interleave

frontier.hypothesis: If the wrapper is genuinely load-bearing: keep it with /* FAKE: sched fence between block copy and halving cluster */ per the FINAL 2026-07-06 do-while-zero ruling, and delete h2 + new_var (which should be independently inert)
frontier.mechanism: do-while-zero-exception (sanctioned w/ FAKE annotation) + ordinary cleanup of the two inert constructs
frontier.next_probe: sandbox the wrapper-kept/h2-new_var-deleted form; expect 0; document lever exhaustion for the annotation

judge_constraints: REGRESSION DIAGNOSIS (completion bar: match must land WITHOUT this construct family): Three cheats found in current main source (src/sound.c:462-476): (1) unannotated do-while(0) wrapper — missing mandatory /* FAKE */ annotation, so the LABEL_OUTSIDE_LOOP_P prerequisite and lever-exhaustion cannot be verified; (2) s16 h2 declared in inner block but never assigned or read — dead local with no semantic purpose (RA/frame coercion); (3) s16 *new_var set to &D_800EEDD8 but used only for a single write — write-only single-use pointer is explicitly NOT covered by pointer-rmw-global-sanctioned (which requires at least one load AND one store through the pointer). Worker must produce a clean pure-C replacement that: eliminates h2, eliminates new_var (write directly via *((&D_800EEDD8)+1)), and either removes the do-while(0) wrapper or — if lever exhaustion is genuine — re-documents and annotates it with /* FAKE: <reason> */.  (committed code flagged by the re-audit patrol; review and re-do in pure C if confirmed. The byte-correct construct stays on main until a clean replacement lands.)
